name: Hubspot
description: This Test Connection validates the access against the server and basic metadata extraction of CRM pipelines and custom event definitions.

steps.name: CheckAccess
steps.description: Validate that the API is accessible with the given credentials
steps.errorMessage: Failed to connect to HubSpot. Please validate the access token.

steps.name: GetPipelines
steps.description: Verify the CRM pipelines endpoint is accessible (deals pipeline)
steps.errorMessage: Failed to reach the pipelines endpoint. Ensure the token has crm.objects.deals.read scope.

steps.name: GetCRMSchemas
steps.description: Verify the CRM properties endpoint is accessible (contacts object)
steps.errorMessage: Failed to reach the CRM properties endpoint. Ensure the token has crm.objects.contacts.read scope.

steps.name: GetEventDefinitions
steps.description: Verify the behavioral event definitions endpoint is accessible
steps.errorMessage: Failed to reach the event definitions endpoint. Ensure the token has behavioral_events.event_definitions.read_write scope.
